arts.ttl: Juventus Target Renato Veiga as Giuntoli Seeks Last Minute Defensive Reinforcements
arts.sum: Juventus are scouting the Premier League market to bolster their defensive lineup, with Sporting Director Cristiano Giuntoli aiming to secure at least one, if not two, new defenders. This move comes in response to Bremer's injury and the imminent departure of Danilo, who is expected to terminate his contract and join Napoli.
